considered.name: Formal mathematics and bounded conjecture discovery
considered.impactRationale: Formal targets have decisive counterexamples and clear proof obligations.
considered.baselineFeasibility: simple rule, known pattern, and bounded counterexample filters

considered.name: Computational materials public descriptor data
considered.impactRationale: Materials property residuals are high-value and public-data compatible.

considered.name: Astrophysics open catalog anomaly structure
considered.impactRationale: Open sky catalogs support safe high-impact anomaly and rival-model tests.
considered.baselineFeasibility: magnitude, selection, and instrument bias baselines

considered.name: Climate and energy public time-indexed records
considered.impactRationale: Safe public climate and energy records matter and have strong baselines.
considered.rejectionReason: Deferred to keep this readiness run to exactly four domains with enough execution depth.

considered.name: Scientific software reproduction fragility
considered.impactRationale: Reproduction alignment is practically useful and externally inspectable.

considered.name: Temporal evaluation fragility
considered.impactRationale: Temporal evaluation errors are common but previous tools remained partial.
considered.baselineFeasibility: seasonal, persistence, and random split baselines
considered.rejectionReason: Deferred to keep this readiness run to exactly four domains with enough execution depth.

considered.name: Safe protein structure metadata reliability
considered.impactRationale: Metadata-level structure reliability is useful while avoiding wet-lab claims.
considered.rejectionReason: Deferred to keep this readiness run to exactly four domains with enough execution depth.

considered.name: Scientific dataset reliability anomalies
considered.impactRationale: Dataset reliability signals can prevent false downstream claims.
considered.rejectionReason: Deferred to keep this readiness run to exactly four domains with enough execution depth.

considered.name: Simulation reproducibility and parameter sensitivity
considered.impactRationale: Simulation parameters can reveal reproducibility boundaries.
considered.rejectionReason: Deferred to keep this readiness run to exactly four domains with enough execution depth.

considered.name: Benchmark methodology fragility
considered.impactRationale: Benchmark artifacts are inspectable but often baseline dominated.
considered.rejectionReason: Deferred to keep this readiness run to exactly four domains with enough execution depth.
